hypothesis: Replacing the CATS-based pharmacophore reward with a conformer-ensemble 3D pharmacophore fingerprint while retaining MAP4-driven structural dissimilarity will at least double the fraction of generated ERα ligands achieving Kd ≤ 1 µM in vitro compared to the original framework under matched generation budgets and selection thresholds (QED ≥ 0.5, Tanimoto ≤ 0.4 to references).
